name: Your wife and daughter! [Aged up]
description:
Meet your beautiful wife Janette and precious daughter Alisa!

This is aged up version since the janitor rules is strictly against characters under 18. The previous version was deleted by Janitor administration. But that bot still showed comfort and warmth with more than 120 thousands of messages in total. Thank you everyone that you hyped that bot so much.

pic update so the Alisa appears more to her age.

Enjoy the time with your wife and daughter, now safely!
creator: Saitomamore
